_meta.title: Seedwarden Phase 2 Analytics Dashboard Schema
_meta.purpose: Metric definitions, alert thresholds, automation rules, and data sources for Phase 2 customer success measurement. Implementable in Google Sheets or any lightweight data tool. Day 45 is the PRIMARY Phase 3 go/no-go gate per the 45-day project roadmap. Day 60 is a confirmation gate for Scenario 3 (Churn Risk) only.

phase3_decision_logic.decision_window_rationale: Original 45-day roadmap sets Day 45 as the Phase 3 commitment deadline. Day 60 is a recovery check for ambiguous data only.

references: TRACK_B_LAUNCH_DAY_OPERATIONS_GUIDE.md (7-metric launch-day dashboard — feeds into M01, M04, M06, M11, M13)

endpoints_available: Shop Manager > Orders (per-order revenue, buyer email, product)
Shop Manager > Stats (views, conversion rate, favorites per listing)
Shop Manager > Finances > Payment Account (net revenue, fee breakdown)
Shop Manager > Stats > Traffic Sources (channel breakdown)
Shop Manager > Marketing > Sales and Coupons (coupon redemption counts)
not_available: Buyer browsing sessions on Etsy marketplace
etsy_shop_manager.automation_option: Etsy Open API v3 — /application/shops/{shop_id}/receipts endpoint, OAuth 2.0, 10 req/sec limit. Set up in Month 2 if weekly manual export exceeds 45 minutes.

kit_email_platform.sequence_reports: Kit > Reports > Sequences > Seedwarden Welcome (open rate and click rate per email, manually recorded)
kit_email_platform.broadcast_reports: Kit > Reports > Broadcasts (per-send open rate, click rate, unsubscribe count)
kit_email_platform.automation_option: Kit Creator plan ($25/month) adds API access. Not needed until subscriber count exceeds 500.

reports: GA4 > Reports > Acquisition > Traffic Acquisition (sessions by source/medium)
GA4 > Reports > Engagement > Pages and Screens (views per listing page)
constraints: GA4 fires only on individual listing pages, not Etsy search results
Purchase events cannot be captured by GA4 on Etsy — all transaction data from Etsy reporting
No custom JavaScript injection possible on Etsy listings

ltv_tracker_spreadsheet.cadence: weekly update (20 minutes, first Monday of month for full reconcile)
ltv_tracker_spreadsheet.description: Single source of truth for individual customer lifetime value, cohort assignment, and repeat purchase tracking. Maintained manually by cross-referencing Etsy order CSV with Kit subscriber export.

questions.text: What best describes how you use Seedwarden guides?
options: Gift for a friend or family member

questions.text: How satisfied are you with your purchase so far?
What would make this guide more useful for you?

metrics.name: total_orders_cumulative
metrics.definition: Count of all completed Etsy orders since Phase 2 launch (2026-05-30). Includes first-time and repeat buyers.
metrics.alert_action: RED: Run traffic vs. conversion diagnostic. If views > 200/listing but orders < 1, problem is conversion (listing quality). If views < 100/listing, problem is visibility (SEO, channel).

metrics.name: gross_revenue_monthly
metrics.definition: Sum of all Etsy order amounts before platform fees for the calendar month. From Etsy Finances > Payment Account CSV.
metrics.alert_action: RED: Phase 3 CONDITIONAL trigger (Scenario 3). Do not commit Phase 3 development resources until Month 2 revenue crosses $600 for two consecutive months.

metrics.name: net_revenue_monthly
metrics.definition: Gross revenue after Etsy platform fees. Formula: gross_revenue * 0.905 - (total_orders * 0.25). Accounts for 6.5% transaction fee + 3% + $0.25 payment processing.

metrics.name: average_order_value
metrics.definition: Gross revenue divided by number of orders for the measurement period.
metrics.alert_action: RED below $18: Bundle listings are not converting. Check whether bundle listings appear in Etsy search for bundle-related keywords. If no bundles sold in 2+ consecutive weeks, audit Campaign 3 bundle recommendation pairing logic.

metrics.name: conversion_rate_store
metrics.definition: Total orders divided by total visits (sessions) to the Etsy shop across all listings. Available in Etsy Shop Manager > Stats. Note: Etsy calculates this as orders / visits, not unique visitors.
metrics.alert_action: RED: Do not increase ad spend or social posting volume. Fix the listing first. Check cover image (is it legible at thumbnail size?), title (does it match buyer search intent?), price (within $2-5 of competitor range?).

metrics.name: phase1_to_phase2_conversion_rate
metrics.definition: Percentage of Phase 1 buyers (first_order_date before 2026-05-30) who have made at least one Phase 2 purchase (any order on or after 2026-05-30). Calculated from LTV tracker.
metrics.alert_action: RED: Check which Phase 1 buyers are in Kit automation. If fewer than 60% of Phase 1 buyers have the `purchased` tag in Kit, the post-purchase lifecycle campaign is not reaching them. Manually apply tags for all unmatched Phase 1 buyers.

metrics.name: repeat_purchase_rate_30d
metrics.definition: Of all buyers whose first purchase was at least 30 days ago, what percentage made a second purchase within 30 days of their first? Rolling calculation — recalculate each month using the prior month's new buyer cohort.
metrics.formula: count(buyers WHERE days_to_repeat <= 30) / count(buyers WHERE first_order_date <= CURRENT_DATE - 30) * 100
metrics.alert_action: RED: Kit automation diagnostic required immediately. Verify Campaign 1 is firing. Check that `purchased` tag is being applied within 24 hours of order. Phase 1 natural repeat rate (no email) was approximately 5%; if Phase 2 is at or below 5% with email running, the email is not reaching buyers.

metrics.name: repeat_purchase_rate_60d
metrics.definition: Of all buyers whose first purchase was at least 60 days ago, what percentage made a second purchase within 60 days of their first?
metrics.alert_action: RED at Day 60: Scenario 3 (Churn Risk) — activate diagnosis protocol. Check Campaign 3 click-to-purchase performance; check whether bundle products are visible in Etsy search for cross-sell terms.

metrics.name: repeat_purchase_rate_90d
metrics.definition: Of all buyers whose first purchase was at least 90 days ago, what percentage made a second purchase within 90 days of their first?

metrics.name: ltv_by_cohort
metrics.definition: Average cumulative revenue per buyer, calculated separately for each cohort tag. From LTV tracker: sum(ltv_to_date) for each cohort / count of buyers in cohort.

thresholds.green: Annualized LTV trajectory within 20% of 12-month target
thresholds.red: Annualized LTV more than 40% below 12-month target

metrics.alert_action: RED on any cohort: audit whether that cohort's lifecycle campaign emails are firing and whether the content matches cohort expectations. Herbalist LTV below $50 at 90 days indicates content personalization has failed — check cohort tag assignment accuracy.

metrics.name: kit_subscriber_count
metrics.definition: Total active subscribers in Kit with at least one non-bounced email send. Does not include unsubscribed or hard-bounce addresses.
metrics.alert_action: RED by Day 60: The landing page / lead magnet funnel is underperforming. Check that the Kit landing page URL is in the Etsy listing 'about' section. Check that the post-purchase email CTA links to the zone card signup page. Increase frequency of social posts that include the free zone card CTA.

metrics.name: kit_subscriber_growth_rate
metrics.definition: New subscribers added minus unsubscribes in the 7-day period. From Kit dashboard subscriber count change week-over-week.

metrics.name: email_campaign1_open_rate
metrics.definition: Percentage of Campaign 1 Email 1 sends that are opened. Tracked in Kit > Sequences > Campaign 1 > Statistics > Email 1.
metrics.alert_action: RED for 2 consecutive weeks: A/B test two new subject lines. 10% sample per variant, 7-day window. If below 25%: deliverability problem (not content). Check SPF/DKIM DNS records in Kit settings.

metrics.name: email_campaign3_click_to_purchase
metrics.definition: Percentage of Campaign 3 Email 3.1 recipients who click the bundle CTA AND complete an Etsy purchase within 7 days (cross-referenced between Kit click data and Etsy order data manually).
metrics.alert_action: RED after 30 buyers have received Campaign 3: the bundle recommendation pairing logic is wrong. Audit which first-purchase → bundle recommendation combinations are receiving the most clicks but fewest purchases. Adjust the product pairing table in phase-2-customer-success-framework.md Section 3.3.

metrics.name: email_unsubscribe_rate
metrics.definition: Percentage of recipients who unsubscribe from any single email send. Tracked per email in Kit > Broadcasts or Kit > Sequences.
metrics.alert_action: RED on any single email: pause all Campaign 2 sends for the current week. The email that triggered the spike has a content-expectation mismatch. Review: is the content zone-specific? Is it too promotional too early in the sequence? Reduce frequency to 1x/week for 30 days and revise the offending email before resending.

metrics.name: nps_score
metrics.definition: From Day 30 newsletter survey: percentage of respondents scoring 9-10 (Promoters) minus percentage scoring 0-6 (Detractors). Passive = 7-8 (not counted). Minimum sample size: 10 responses to calculate.
metrics.cadence: monthly (calculate from all responses received in 30-day window)
metrics.alert_action: RED: Do not launch Phase 3 until root cause is identified. Conduct 3-5 direct buyer conversations (phone or video) within 14 days. Common causes: guide content quality issue, incorrect zone information, unclear navigation in the guide. Document findings in WORKLOG.md.

metrics.name: day7_satisfaction_score
metrics.definition: Average of all 1-10 satisfaction scores from the Day 7 post-purchase survey (Question 2). Delivery: Campaign 1 Email 2 (Day 2), survey link, responses arrive by Day 7.
metrics.cadence: weekly (track individually; alert on any score below 6)
metrics.alert_action: Any individual score of 6 or below: personal reply from Anya within 24 hours. Three or more scores below 7 in a single week: the guide has a product quality problem. Pause further promotion of that listing until the issue is resolved.

metrics.name: bundle_revenue_percentage
metrics.display_name: Bundle Revenue as % of Total Revenue
metrics.definition: Sum of revenue from all bundle listings divided by total gross revenue for the measurement period. From Etsy Stats > filter by bundle listing names.
metrics.alert_action: RED: Bundle listings may not be appearing in Etsy search for bundle-related queries. Update bundle listing titles and tags to include 'bundle', 'set', 'collection' keywords. Check that Campaign 3 upsell emails are linking directly to bundle listings.

metrics.name: cohort_distribution
metrics.definition: Percentage of buyers in each cohort tag in Kit, calculated from monthly Kit subscriber export filtered by the `purchased` tag.

thresholds.green: All cohorts within target share bands; Unknown below 15%
thresholds.yellow: One cohort outside target share by more than 10 percentage points OR Unknown between 15-25%
thresholds.red: One cohort above 55% of total buyers OR Unknown above 25%

metrics.alert_action: One cohort above 55%: run Phase 3 Option D (Focused Single-Cohort) evaluation per phase-3-decision-framework.md Branch B. Unknown above 25%: post-purchase survey is not reaching buyers — check Kit automation delivery and Etsy order confirmation CTA.

metrics.name: churn_early_warning
metrics.definition: Count of buyers with the `purchased` tag in Kit who have not opened any email in the prior 14 days. Calculated from Kit subscriber export: filter by `purchased` tag, then filter by `open_count` stagnant for 14 days (manual comparison of two monthly exports).
metrics.unit: count and percentage of purchased subscribers
metrics.alert_action: RED: Fire Campaign 4 (Re-engagement) immediately for all buyers in this population, regardless of the Day 45 timing trigger. Cold buyers who remain cold past 30 days have significantly lower re-purchase probability — intervene earlier.

metrics.name: etsy_ads_roas
metrics.display_name: Etsy Ads Return on Ad Spend (ROAS)
metrics.definition: Etsy Ads revenue attributed / Etsy Ads spend for the measurement period. Available in Etsy Shop Manager > Marketing > Etsy Ads. Only relevant if Etsy Ads are running.
metrics.alert_action: RED for any listing after 21 days: pause ads on that listing immediately. The listing has a conversion problem that paid traffic will not solve. Fix the listing (cover image, description, price) and restart ads after 14 days of organic-only testing. GREEN (above 2.5) for 30+ days: increase daily budget 25-50% — this is a scale signal.

metrics.name: social_referral_percentage
metrics.display_name: Social Referral Traffic as % of Total Etsy Sessions
metrics.definition: Sessions arriving at Etsy shop from social channels (Instagram, Pinterest, TikTok) as a percentage of total sessions. From Etsy Stats > Traffic Sources.
metrics.alert_action: RED by Day 60: Social content is not converting to Etsy traffic. Check UTM parameters are on all bio links. Review which platform shows highest click-through in GA4 (Instagram vs. Pinterest vs. TikTok). Shift posting volume to the highest-converting platform.

metrics.name: phase3_readiness_score
metrics.definition: Composite pass/fail score across 6 criteria. Preliminary evaluation at Day 30; binding evaluation at Day 45 (PRIMARY gate). Day 60 used only for Scenario 3 (Churn Risk) recovery confirmation. Each criterion is binary (PASS or FAIL). Score is count of PASSes out of 6.
metrics.cadence: Day 30 (preliminary) + Day 45 (PRIMARY binding gate) + Day 60 (Scenario 3 only)

criteria.description: Total orders >= 40 by Day 45 (or >= 50 by Day 60 if Scenario 3)
Gross revenue >= $800 in Month 2 (or >= $1,000 by Day 60 if Scenario 3)
Phase 1 to Phase 2 conversion rate >= 8% at Day 45
Repeat purchase rate >= 8% at Day 45 (14%+ for Scenario 1)
Kit subscribers >= 60 by Day 45 (>= 80 by Day 60)

thresholds.5_or_6_of_6_at_day45: Scenario 1 — Full Phase 3 GO (Women's Health bundle + Tier 2 wholesale, September 2026). Decision final at Day 45.
thresholds.3_or_4_of_6_at_day45: Scenario 2 — Standard Phase 3 GO (Women's Health bundle September, Tier 2 wholesale November). Decision final at Day 45.
thresholds.1_or_2_of_6_at_day45: Scenario 3 — Churn Risk, CONDITIONAL (run diagnosis protocol; evaluate recovery at Day 60)
thresholds.0_of_6_at_day45: Fundamental issue — pause Phase 3 entirely; fix Phase 2 foundations before any further expansion

metrics.name: vip_buyer_count
metrics.definition: Count of buyers with the `vip` tag in Kit (applied when cumulative purchase count reaches 3). Also track as % of total buyers.
metrics.alert_action: 0 VIP buyers by Day 90: the Campaign 3 upsell or the Campaign 6 VIP track is not generating third purchases. Audit whether Campaign 3 Email 3.2 is firing for buyers who opened but did not click Email 3.1. Also check LTV tracker — are there buyers with 3+ purchases who have not yet received the VIP tag?

metrics.name: newsletter_open_rate
metrics.definition: Open rate for each weekly broadcast newsletter send, tracked in Kit > Reports > Broadcasts.
metrics.alert_action: RED for 3 consecutive sends: list health is degrading. Step 1: check cold subscriber percentage (open rate below 15% per subscriber). If above 25% of list, trigger win-back automation for cold segment. Step 2: test one subject line revision using specific seasonal urgency hook instead of generic botanical topic. Step 3: if bi-weekly frequency reduces open rate further, return to weekly with revised subject line approach.

automation_rules.name: day_30_retention_check
automation_rules.action: Run M07 (30-day repeat purchase rate). If M07 < 5%: flag IMMEDIATE_ESCALATION. Record results in Monthly Dashboard Block B. Run Phase 3 readiness score (M23) preliminary evaluation.
automation_rules.escalation: If M07 < 5%: check Kit automation same day. Do not wait for next Sunday review.
automation_rules.notify: Record in WORKLOG.md within 48 hours of Day 30.

automation_rules.name: day_45_primary_phase3_gate
automation_rules.trigger: Day 45 post Phase 2 launch (2026-07-14) — PRIMARY go/no-go date per 45-day roadmap
automation_rules.action: Pull M01, M02, M06, M07, M08, M11, M18, M19, M20, M23. Match to Scenario 1/2/3/4 per phase-2-customer-success-framework.md Part 4.1a quick-reference table. Record binding Phase 3 decision.

decision_rule.scenario_1_high_growth: M06 >= 8% AND M07 >= 14% AND buyers >= 75 → FULL_GO: Begin Women's Health bundle development August 1. Initiate Tier 2 wholesale outreach. Decision is final — no Day 60 check required.
decision_rule.scenario_2_steady_growth: M06 4-8% AND M07 8-14% AND buyers 40-75 → STANDARD_GO: Begin Women's Health bundle development August 1. Tier 2 wholesale deferred to Day 90. Decision is final.
decision_rule.scenario_3_churn_risk: M06 < 4% OR M07 < 6% OR buyers < 35 → CONDITIONAL: Activate diagnosis protocol. Defer Phase 3 commitment. Re-evaluate at Day 60 (July 29).
decision_rule.scenario_4_explosive: Already triggered before Day 45 → CONFIRM and record. No new decision.

automation_rules.notify: Decision must be recorded in WORKLOG.md by July 16, 2026. For Scenario 3: note which metric(s) triggered conditional status and activate diagnosis protocol same day.

automation_rules.name: day_60_scenario3_confirmation
automation_rules.trigger: Day 60 post Phase 2 launch (2026-07-29) — ONLY if Day 45 was Scenario 3 (Churn Risk). Skip for Scenarios 1 and 2.
automation_rules.action: Pull M06, M07, M08, M11, M16, M20. Determine whether churn was recoverable (repeat rate recovered to 8%+) or structural (still below 6%).

decision_rule.recovery_confirmed: M07 >= 8% at Day 60 → COMPRESSED_GO: Women's Health bundle development begins; target December 2026 launch.
decision_rule.structural_churn: M07 < 6% at Day 60 → DEFER: Phase 3 moved to Q1 2027. Document root cause in WORKLOG.md.

automation_rules.notify: Decision must be recorded in WORKLOG.md by July 31, 2026.

automation_rules.name: churn_early_warning_alert
automation_rules.trigger: M20 (at-risk buyer percentage) crosses 30% at any monthly check
automation_rules.action: Fire Campaign 4 (Re-engagement) for all buyers in the at-risk population, regardless of Day 45 trigger. Do not wait for the scheduled Campaign 4 timing.
automation_rules.escalation: If M20 > 30% and firing Campaign 4 does not reduce at-risk percentage below 25% within 14 days: the email content is not reaching buyers (deliverability issue). Check Kit SPF/DKIM configuration.
automation_rules.notify: Log in WORKLOG.md same day as detection.

automation_rules.name: nps_red_alert
automation_rules.trigger: Any single Day 7 satisfaction score (M17) of 6 or below OR NPS (M16) below 20
automation_rules.action: Level 1 escalation — personal reply from Anya within 24 hours to the buyer who submitted the low score. If 3+ Day 7 scores below 7 in same week: audit that listing's product quality.
automation_rules.escalation: NPS below 20: Do not proceed with Phase 3 launch. Schedule 3-5 buyer calls within 14 days. Document root cause in WORKLOG.md.
automation_rules.notify: Immediate — same day as response receipt.

automation_rules.name: kit_automation_health_check
automation_rules.trigger: Launch day (2026-05-30) at 11am AND weekly (every Sunday) for first 30 days
automation_rules.action: Verify that Campaign 1 Email 1 has fired for all new buyers from the prior 24 hours. Method: Kit > Sequences > Campaign 1 > Activity; compare send count to Etsy order count for same period.
automation_rules.failure_response: If sends < Etsy orders: Zapier integration has failed. Activate Option B (manual CSV tag assignment) immediately. Apply `purchased` tags to all unmatched buyers in Kit manually before 5pm same day.
automation_rules.notify: Log any automation failures in WORKLOG.md.

automation_rules.name: etsy_ads_roas_scaling
automation_rules.trigger: M21 (ROAS) above 2.5 for any listing for 30+ consecutive days
automation_rules.action: Increase daily ad budget for that listing by 25-50%. This is a scale signal, not a maintenance signal.
automation_rules.escalation: If ROAS drops below 2.0 after budget increase: return budget to prior level and investigate whether increased spend triggered higher competition for the same keyword.

automation_rules.name: cohort_concentration_alert
automation_rules.trigger: Any single cohort exceeds 55% of total buyers at any monthly review (M19)
automation_rules.action: Evaluate Phase 3 Option D (Focused Single-Cohort) per phase-3-decision-framework.md Branch B. Shift content calendar to front-load products for the dominant cohort.
automation_rules.notify: Record dominant cohort and Option D evaluation in WORKLOG.md within the monthly review session.

automation_rules.name: zero_order_day_alert
automation_rules.trigger: Zero Etsy orders on any day after Day 7 when listing views are 100+
automation_rules.action: This is a conversion problem, not a traffic problem. Do not increase social posting volume. Audit: cover image legibility at thumbnail size, title keyword match to buyer intent, price relative to competitor range. Fix before next day.
automation_rules.escalation: Zero orders for 5+ consecutive days (any view count): escalate to user as Level 1 — check if listings are still active/visible in Etsy search.
automation_rules.notify: Log in daily check notes; escalate immediately if 3+ consecutive zero-order days.

automation_rules.name: vip_tag_monthly_assignment
automation_rules.trigger: First Monday of each month (monthly review session)
automation_rules.action: Cross-reference LTV tracker with Kit subscriber export. For any buyer with 3+ purchase orders in the LTV tracker who does not yet have the `vip` tag in Kit: apply `vip` tag manually. Also ensure these buyers are excluded from Campaign 3, 4, and 5 sequences.
automation_rules.notify: Record count of new VIP buyers added this month in Monthly Data Log.

day_0.label: Launch Day Activation
day_0.output: T=0 baseline recorded in Daily tab; Kit automation verified; LTV tracker zero-state committed. No decisions — this is setup only.

day_30.label: Early Warning Checkpoint (diagnostic only — not a go/no-go gate)
day_30.output: Preliminary Phase 3 readiness score (M23) recorded. Any Level 1 escalations triggered. No Phase 3 decision made at Day 30.

escalation_triggers.total_orders_below_20: Traffic vs. conversion diagnostic in phase-2-analytics-strategy.md
escalation_triggers.repeat_rate_below_5pct: Kit automation check — do not wait for Sunday review
escalation_triggers.kit_subscribers_below_30: Landing page / lead magnet funnel audit

day_45.label: PRIMARY Phase 3 Go/No-Go Gate (binding decision — 45-day roadmap window)
day_45.output: Phase 3 go/no-go decision (Scenario 1/2/3/4) recorded in WORKLOG.md by July 16. Final for Scenarios 1, 2, and 4. Conditional for Scenario 3 (defers to Day 60 confirmation).

decision_rule.scenario_1: Repeat rate > 14% AND conversion > 8% AND buyers >= 75 → Full GO
decision_rule.scenario_2: Repeat rate 8-14% AND conversion 4-8% AND buyers 40-75 → Standard GO
decision_rule.scenario_3: Repeat rate < 6% OR conversion < 4% OR buyers < 35 → Conditional; activate diagnosis; defer to Day 60
decision_rule.scenario_4: Already triggered before Day 45 (Day 14 signal) → Confirm and record

day_60.label: Scenario 3 Confirmation Gate (skip if Day 45 was Scenario 1 or 2)
day_60.output: Scenario 3 recovery evaluation: repeat rate recovered to 8%+ → compressed Phase 3 GO (December 2026). Still below 6% → defer to Q1 2027. Decision in WORKLOG.md by July 31.
day_60.note: For Scenarios 1 and 2: Day 60 falls in the regular monthly review cadence. No special gate action required.

day_90.label: Monthly Deep Dive + Phase 3 Development Progress Check
day_90.output: Cohort LTV validation; Phase 3 execution status check; Women's Health bundle development progress; Tier 2 wholesale readiness assessment

tabs.purpose: 5-minute daily check — orders, revenue anomaly, Kit growth
30-minute Sunday review — email performance, cohort health, escalation checklist
2-hour first-Monday deep dive — LTV by cohort, Phase 3 readiness score, retention validation
Per-buyer lifetime value, cohort tag, repeat purchase dates. Primary key: buyer_email
Day 30 / Day 45 / Day 60 / Day 90 decisions. Permanent record of go/no-go determinations
Day 7 satisfaction scores and free text. NPS calculation. Voice-of-customer input for Phase 3 product decisions
Copy of WORKLOG.md entries related to escalations and decisions. Cross-reference with the markdown WORKLOG.md
tabs.update_cadence: Same day as any escalation or decision

upgrade_triggers: Monthly orders > 300: evaluate Looker Studio + Etsy/Kit Zapier connectors ($30/month) for automated daily refresh
LTV tracker > 150 rows: switch to Jupyter notebook queries (analytics/dashboard-template.ipynb) for cohort LTV calculations
Kit subscribers > 500: evaluate Kit Creator plan API access ($25/month) for automated monthly export

phase3_trigger_summary.gate_structure_note: Day 45 (2026-07-14) is the PRIMARY go/no-go gate for all scenarios. Day 60 (2026-07-29) is used only for Scenario 3 (Churn Risk) recovery confirmation. The original 45-day project roadmap is the binding commitment window.

scenario_1_high_growth.decision: Full Phase 3 GO — binding at Day 45

scenario_2_steady_growth.decision: Standard Phase 3 GO — binding at Day 45
scenario_2_steady_growth.tier2_wholesale: November 2026 (pending Day 90 check at October 29 — target: 75+ buyers)

scenario_3_churn_risk.decision_at_day45: CONDITIONAL — activate diagnosis protocol; defer Phase 3 commitment

decision_at_day60.recovery_confirmed: Repeat rate >= 8% → Compressed GO (Women's Health bundle December 2026)
decision_at_day60.structural_churn: Repeat rate still < 6% → Defer to Q1 2027

scenario_3_churn_risk.tier2_wholesale: On hold until repeat rate crosses 10%

triggers_early_signal.repeat_signal_day14: Any second purchase within 14 days of first

scenario_4_explosive_growth.decision: Immediate Phase 3 acceleration — do not wait for Day 45
scenario_4_explosive_growth.contractor_trigger: If total weekly work hours exceed 20 at Day 21: outsource social media content or mockup production
